1.title: Fat-Burning HIIT
1.description: Short high-intensity intervals to maximize calorie burn

exercises.name: Jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: Steady pace, arms fully extended overhead

exercises.name: High knees
exercises.instructions: Drive knees above hip height, build pace progressively

exercises.name: Dynamic arm circles
exercises.instructions: Large fast circles, forward then backward

exercises.name: Burpees
exercises.instructions: Drop to plank, push-up, stand and jump

exercises.name: Mountain climbers
exercises.instructions: In plank, alternate driving knees toward your chest rapidly

exercises.name: Jump squats
exercises.instructions: Deep squat, explode upward, land softly

exercises.name: Plank shoulder taps
exercises.instructions: High plank, alternately tap the opposite shoulder

exercises.name: Walking in place
exercises.instructions: Gradually bring your heart rate down

exercises.name: Quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Standing, grab your foot behind you, keep your knee pointing down

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s through the nose, exhale 6s through the mouth — 4 cycles

2.title: Explosive Tabata
2.description: Classic 20/10 Tabata format to spike your cardio in minimal time

exercises.name: Jogging in place
exercises.instructions: Light jog, build pace gradually

exercises.name: Dynamic squats
exercises.instructions: Fast squats, rise onto your toes at the top

exercises.name: Torso rotations
exercises.instructions: Feet planted, rotate your upper body dynamically

exercises.name: Burpees without jump
exercises.instructions: Drop to the floor, stand back up as fast as possible

exercises.name: Speed skaters
exercises.instructions: Lateral jumps, touch the floor with the hand opposite the landing foot

exercises.name: High knees sprint
exercises.instructions: Sprint in place, drive knees as high as possible

exercises.name: Plank jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: In plank, jump feet out wide then back together

exercises.name: Slow walk
exercises.instructions: Ease your heart rate down by walking gently

exercises.name: Calf stretch
exercises.instructions: Step one foot forward, push the back heel into the floor

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Extend one leg in front, hinge forward at the hips

3.title: Intense Cardio Circuit
3.description: Variety of exercises in a circuit to build cardio and endurance

exercises.name: Lateral shuffles
exercises.instructions: Dynamic side steps, stay low on your feet

exercises.name: Knee drives with arms
exercises.instructions: Drive knees up while pushing arms overhead

exercises.name: Dynamic forward lunges
exercises.instructions: Long strides forward, arms moving in opposition

exercises.name: Full burpees
exercises.instructions: Plank, push-up, explosive jump — keep the pace

exercises.name: Mountain climbers sprint
exercises.instructions: Plank position, drive knees to your chest as fast as possible

exercises.name: Jump squats
exercises.instructions: Controlled descent, explosive jump, land flat-footed

exercises.name: Jumping lunges
exercises.instructions: Alternate lunges with a jump, stay braced through the movement

exercises.name: Commando planks
exercises.instructions: Alternate between forearm plank and high plank without rotating your hips

exercises.name: Walking in place
exercises.instructions: Decelerate gradually

exercises.name: Hip flexor stretch
exercises.instructions: Back knee on the floor, push hips forward

exercises.name: 4-7-8 breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s, hold 7s, exhale 8s — 3 cycles

4.title: HIIT Acceleration
4.description: More rounds, less rest — stepping up the intensity

exercises.name: Progressive jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: Start slow, accelerate through the final seconds

exercises.name: High knees
exercises.instructions: Drive knees high, arms pumping in opposition, keep a steady pace

exercises.name: World's greatest stretch
exercises.instructions: Lunge, hand to floor, rotate torso and lift opposite arm

exercises.name: Burpees with push-up
exercises.instructions: Drop to the floor, full push-up, stand and jump

exercises.name: Jump squats
exercises.instructions: Deep squat, jump as high as possible

exercises.name: Cross-body mountain climbers
exercises.instructions: Drive knee toward opposite elbow in plank, keep pace high

exercises.name: Jumping lunges
exercises.instructions: Alternate lunges with a jump, back knee nearly touches the floor

exercises.name: Plank shoulder taps
exercises.instructions: In high plank, tap opposite shoulder without rotating your hips

exercises.name: Slow walk
exercises.instructions: Fully decelerate, take long breaths

exercises.name: Quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Grab your foot, pull heel toward your glutes

exercises.name: Chest stretch
exercises.instructions: Arm extended against a wall, rotate your torso away

5.title: Double Impact Tabata
5.description: Two targeted Tabata blocks: legs then upper body

exercises.name: Dynamic squats
exercises.instructions: Fast squats, rise onto your toes

exercises.name: Incline push-ups
exercises.instructions: Hands on a chair, fast push-ups

exercises.name: Jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: High pace to get your heart rate up

exercises.name: Jump squats
exercises.instructions: Explosive squat, jump as high as possible, land softly

exercises.name: Deep speed skaters
exercises.instructions: Wide lateral jumps, descend low, touch the floor

exercises.name: Jumping lunges
exercises.instructions: Alternate lunges by exploding upward

exercises.name: Squat pulses
exercises.instructions: Hold the bottom of your squat and pulse rapidly

exercises.name: Fast push-ups
exercises.instructions: Max-pace push-ups, chest to floor

exercises.name: Fast commando planks
exercises.instructions: Move from forearms to hands as fast as possible

exercises.name: Mountain climbers sprint
exercises.instructions: Sprint knees to chest in plank

exercises.name: Pike push-ups
exercises.instructions: Inverted-V position, shoulder-focused push-ups, fast pace

exercises.name: Walking in place
exercises.instructions: Wind down progressively

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended in front, hinge forward

exercises.name: Shoulder stretch
exercises.instructions: Pull one arm across your chest with the other hand

6.title: Endurance-Power Circuit
6.description: Longer circuit with compound exercises for endurance

exercises.name: Bear crawl
exercises.instructions: Move forward and back on all fours, knees hovering off the floor

exercises.name: Dynamic forward lunges
exercises.instructions: Long forward strides

exercises.name: Jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: High pace

exercises.name: Full burpees
exercises.instructions: Plank, push-up, explosive jump

exercises.name: Squat pulse jumps
exercises.instructions: 3 pulses at the bottom of the squat then an explosive jump

exercises.name: Mountain climbers sprint
exercises.instructions: Maximum pace in plank

exercises.name: Tuck jumps
exercises.instructions: Jump and pull your knees to your chest

exercises.name: Plank knee taps
exercises.instructions: In plank, alternately tap each knee with the opposite hand

exercises.name: Slow walk
exercises.instructions: Fully decelerate

exercises.name: Deep calf stretch
exercises.instructions: Back foot flat on the floor, push through the heel

exercises.name: Child's pose
exercises.instructions: Knees on the floor, arms extended in front

7.title: Maximum Power HIIT
7.description: Long rounds, short rest — advanced exercises

exercises.name: Slow burpees
exercises.instructions: 5 controlled burpees to warm up

exercises.name: Light jumping lunges
exercises.instructions: Small hops between lunges

exercises.name: Bear crawl
exercises.instructions: Move forward on all fours, knees hovering

exercises.name: Burpees with tuck jump
exercises.instructions: Full burpee with a tuck jump instead of a regular jump

exercises.name: Tuck jump squats
exercises.instructions: Deep squat, jump and pull your knees to your chest

exercises.name: Sprint mountain climbers
exercises.instructions: In plank, sprint your knees as fast as possible

exercises.name: Explosive jumping lunges
exercises.instructions: Lunge jumps with maximum height

exercises.name: Sprawls
exercises.instructions: Throw yourself flat to the floor, explode back up

exercises.name: Very slow walk
exercises.instructions: Long nasal breaths

exercises.name: Inner thigh stretch
exercises.instructions: Feet wide apart, lower gently

exercises.name: 4-7-8 breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s, hold 7s, exhale 8s

exercises.name: Sprint in place
exercises.instructions: Run in place at 70% intensity

exercises.name: Scorpion stretch
exercises.instructions: On your stomach, lift one foot toward the opposite hand

exercises.name: Light jump squats
exercises.instructions: Small hops out of the squat

exercises.name: Burpees with tuck jump
exercises.instructions: Full burpee finishing with a knees-to-chest jump

exercises.name: Speed skaters
exercises.instructions: Fast lateral jumps, touch the floor

exercises.name: 180° jump squats
exercises.instructions: Squat, jump and spin a full half-turn

exercises.name: Plyometric push-ups
exercises.instructions: Explosive push-up, hands leave the floor

exercises.name: High knees sprint
exercises.instructions: Drive knees as high as possible, maximum speed

exercises.name: Plank up-downs
exercises.instructions: Move from forearms to hands without swaying

exercises.name: Fast jumping lunges
exercises.instructions: Alternating lunge jumps as fast as possible

exercises.name: Sprawl to jump
exercises.instructions: Throw yourself to the floor, get up and jump immediately

exercises.name: All-out burpees
exercises.instructions: Burpees at maximum speed

exercises.name: Tuck jumps
exercises.instructions: Jump and pull knees to your chest

exercises.name: Mountain climbers sprint
exercises.instructions: As fast as you can

exercises.name: Star jumps
exercises.instructions: Jump wide, arms and legs spread

exercises.name: Walking in place
exercises.instructions: Bring your heart rate down

exercises.name: Deep calf stretch
exercises.instructions: Back foot flat on the floor

exercises.name: Pigeon stretch
exercises.instructions: Front leg bent, sink your chest toward the floor

exercises.name: Inchworms with push-up
exercises.instructions: Walk hands out to plank, push-up, walk back up

exercises.name: Carioca
exercises.instructions: Lateral cross-step shuffle, quick feet

exercises.name: High skipping
exercises.instructions: Skip with very high knee drive

exercises.name: Burpees with tuck jump
exercises.instructions: Full burpee with a knees-to-chest jump

exercises.name: Spider-Man mountain climbers
exercises.instructions: Drive knee toward the elbow on the same side

exercises.name: Star jump squats
exercises.instructions: Deep squat, explode into a star jump

exercises.name: Commando push-ups
exercises.instructions: Alternate forearm plank and high plank

exercises.name: Broad jump burpees
exercises.instructions: Broad jump, then burpee on landing

exercises.name: High knees sprint
exercises.instructions: Knees high sprint, absolute speed

exercises.name: Slow walk
exercises.instructions: Wind down, shake out arms and legs

exercises.name: Seated glute stretch
exercises.instructions: Cross ankle over knee, pull

exercises.name: Breathing savasana
exercises.instructions: Lie on your back, breathe for 5 cycles

10.title: Ultimate HIIT
10.description: The peak of the program — long work, short rest

exercises.name: Tempo burpees
exercises.instructions: Full burpees at a moderate tempo

exercises.name: High knees with arms
exercises.instructions: Drive knees high, reach arms overhead

exercises.name: Walking lunges with twist
exercises.instructions: Stride forward into a lunge, rotate your torso

exercises.name: Devil press
exercises.instructions: Burpee, stand up and jump with arms overhead

exercises.name: Tuck jump squats
exercises.instructions: Deep squat, jump and tuck knees to chest

exercises.name: Mountain climbers sprint
exercises.instructions: Drive knees to your chest at maximum speed

exercises.name: Alternating jumping lunges
exercises.instructions: Deep lunge jumps, pure explosiveness

exercises.name: Sprawl to broad jump
exercises.instructions: Sprawl to the floor, stand and broad jump

exercises.name: Plank jacks to push-up
exercises.instructions: Two plank jacks then one explosive push-up

exercises.name: Very slow walk
exercises.instructions: Bring your heart rate down gently

exercises.name: Deep quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Grab your foot, push your hip forward

exercises.name: Back stretch
exercises.instructions: Seated, legs extended, hinge forward

exercises.name: 4-7-8 breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s, hold 7s, exhale 8s

11.title: All-Out Tabata
11.description: Three Tabata sets with the most demanding exercises

exercises.name: Progressive jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: Start slow, finish at maximum speed

exercises.name: World's greatest stretch
exercises.instructions: Lunge, hand to floor, rotate torso upward

exercises.name: Crescendo jump squats
exercises.instructions: Jump a little higher with each rep

exercises.name: Burpee broad jumps
exercises.instructions: Burpee then broad jump forward, turn around

exercises.name: Continuous 180° jump squats
exercises.instructions: Jump squat with half-turn, never stop

exercises.name: Explosive sprawls
exercises.instructions: Throw yourself to the floor, explode back up

exercises.name: Star jumps
exercises.instructions: Full star jump at maximum range

exercises.name: Burpees with tuck jump
exercises.instructions: Burpee finishing with a tuck jump

exercises.name: Wide plyometric push-ups
exercises.instructions: Explosive push-ups, hands leave and land wide

exercises.name: Deep speed skaters
exercises.instructions: Wide lateral jumps, descend very low

exercises.name: All-out high knees
exercises.instructions: Sprint in place at 100% effort

exercises.name: Recovery walk
exercises.instructions: Walk very slowly, breathe through your nose

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Heel on a surface, hinge forward

exercises.name: Cobra stretch
exercises.instructions: On your stomach, push through your hands to open your chest

exercises.name: Full breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale into belly, ribs, chest — exhale slowly

12.title: Final Boss Circuit
12.description: The hardest circuit of the program — minimal rest, maximum rounds

exercises.name: Controlled burpees
exercises.instructions: Full burpees at a moderate pace

exercises.name: Lateral shuffles
exercises.instructions: Fast side-to-side shuffles, touch the floor

exercises.name: A-skips
exercises.instructions: High knee skips moving forward, arms in opposition

exercises.name: Burpee tuck jump broad jump
exercises.instructions: Burpee, tuck jump, broad jump — the full trio

exercises.name: Mountain climbers sprint
exercises.instructions: Absolute speed, hips low

exercises.name: 360° jump squats
exercises.instructions: Deep squat, jump and spin a full rotation

exercises.name: Superman push-ups
exercises.instructions: Explosive push-up, lift arms and legs off the floor

exercises.name: High knees to tuck jumps
exercises.instructions: 4 fast high knees then 1 tuck jump

exercises.name: Sprawl with rotation
exercises.instructions: Sprawl to the floor, stand up and turn 180°

exercises.name: Very slow walk
exercises.instructions: Let your heart rate drop

exercises.name: Full leg stretch
exercises.instructions: Deep lunge, alternate sides

exercises.name: Pigeon stretch
exercises.instructions: Front leg bent, release your hips

exercises.name: Final savasana
exercises.instructions: Lie down, arms out wide, palms up — program complete

1.title: Full-Body Discovery
1.description: First fundamental movements: squats, modified push-ups and core work

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles — slow and controlled

exercises.name: Walking in place
exercises.instructions: Gradually raise your knees, swing your arms

exercises.name: Hip circles
exercises.instructions: Hands on hips, large circles in both directions

exercises.name: Assisted squats
exercises.instructions: Feet shoulder-width apart, sit back as if into a chair, hands forward for balance

exercises.name: Knee push-ups
exercises.instructions: Hands shoulder-width apart, knees on the floor, lower your chest to the ground

exercises.name: Knee plank
exercises.instructions: Forearms on the floor, knees down, body aligned, hold for 20 seconds

exercises.name: Glute bridge
exercises.instructions: Lying on your back, feet flat, lift your hips by squeezing your glutes

exercises.name: Quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Standing, grab your foot behind you, each leg

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Seated, legs extended, hinge forward at the hips

exercises.name: Chest stretch
exercises.instructions: Arm against a wall, gently rotate your torso away

2.title: Easy Cardio
2.description: Light circuit to activate cardio without stressing your joints

exercises.name: Brisk walking in place
exercises.instructions: Accelerate gradually, use big arm swings

exercises.name: Light heel flicks
exercises.instructions: In place, gently flick your heels toward your glutes

exercises.name: Torso rotations
exercises.instructions: Feet planted, rotate your upper body left and right

exercises.name: Lateral shuffles
exercises.instructions: Dynamic side steps, stay low

exercises.name: Knee drives
exercises.instructions: Lift knees to hip height, moderate pace

exercises.name: Sumo squats
exercises.instructions: Feet wide, toes out, lower slowly

exercises.name: Bear walk
exercises.instructions: On all fours, knees hovering, move forward and back

exercises.name: Slow walk in place
exercises.instructions: Ease down gradually, breathe deeply

exercises.name: Calf stretch
exercises.instructions: One foot forward, press the back heel into the floor

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s, hold 4s, exhale 4s — 3 cycles

3.title: Strength & Core
3.description: Core and posture focus with controlled and accessible movements

exercises.name: Cat-cow
exercises.instructions: On all fours, alternate rounding and arching your back with your breath

exercises.name: Thoracic rotation
exercises.instructions: On all fours, one hand behind your head, open your elbow toward the sky

exercises.name: Arm swings
exercises.instructions: Standing, let your arms swing loosely side to side

exercises.name: Dead bug
exercises.instructions: Lying down, arms reaching toward the ceiling, extend one leg and the opposite arm

exercises.name: Superman
exercises.instructions: Lying face down, lift arms and legs simultaneously, hold for 2s

exercises.name: Side plank on knees
exercises.instructions: Elbow and knee on the floor, body aligned, hold 15 seconds each side

exercises.name: Reverse lunges
exercises.instructions: Take a big step back, back knee nearly touches the floor, stand up

exercises.name: Child's pose
exercises.instructions: Knees on the floor, arms extended in front, release your back

exercises.name: Supine twist
exercises.instructions: Lying down, draw one knee toward your chest and let it fall to the opposite side

exercises.name: Psoas stretch
exercises.instructions: Low lunge, push the hip of the back knee forward

4.title: Full-Body Progression
4.description: Back to the fundamentals with more volume and less rest

exercises.name: Light jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: Moderate jumps, arms overhead, comfortable pace

exercises.name: Arm circles
exercises.instructions: Small circles then large circles, forward then backward

exercises.name: Mobility squats
exercises.instructions: Lower slowly into a deep squat, elbows inside knees to open the hips

exercises.name: Squats
exercises.instructions: Feet shoulder-width apart, controlled descent, drive through your heels

exercises.name: Knee push-ups
exercises.instructions: Lower your chest to the floor, push up as you exhale, keep your core tight

exercises.name: Alternating lunges
exercises.instructions: Big step forward, back knee near the floor, alternate legs

exercises.name: Knee plank
exercises.instructions: Forearms on floor, knees down, brace your core, hold 25 seconds

exercises.name: Glute bridge
exercises.instructions: Lift your hips, squeeze your glutes at the top for 2 seconds, lower down

exercises.name: Standing quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Grab your foot, pull heel toward glutes, keep knee pointing down

exercises.name: Hip flexor stretch
exercises.instructions: Back knee on the floor, shift pelvis forward, feel the stretch at the front of the hip

exercises.name: Back stretch
exercises.instructions: Standing, clasp hands in front, round your back and push hands away

exercises.name: Moderate knee drives
exercises.instructions: Lift knees above hip height

exercises.name: Lateral shuffles
exercises.instructions: Fast side steps

exercises.name: Dynamic hip circles
exercises.instructions: Lift one knee and draw a circle

exercises.name: Jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: Jumps with arms reaching overhead

exercises.name: Squats with toe raise
exercises.instructions: Regular squat, rise onto your toes at the top

exercises.name: Slow mountain climbers
exercises.instructions: Push-up position, drive one knee toward your chest

exercises.name: Lateral shuffles + floor touch
exercises.instructions: Three side steps, touch the floor

exercises.name: Light jumping lunges
exercises.instructions: Small hops to alternate legs

exercises.name: Walking in place
exercises.instructions: Wind down gradually

exercises.name: Wall calf stretch
exercises.instructions: Hands on the wall, one foot back

exercises.name: Standing inner thigh stretch
exercises.instructions: Feet very wide, bend one knee

exercises.name: Cat-cow
exercises.instructions: Round your back on the exhale, arch on the inhale

exercises.name: Glute bridge
exercises.instructions: Lift your hips over 3 seconds, hold for 2 seconds

exercises.name: Alternating bird dogs
exercises.instructions: On all fours, extend right arm and left leg

exercises.name: Dead bug
exercises.instructions: Back flat on the floor, extend opposite arm and leg

exercises.name: Superman with hold
exercises.instructions: Lift arms and legs, hold for 3 seconds at the top

exercises.name: Knee plank
exercises.instructions: Forearms on floor, knees down, hold 30 seconds

exercises.name: Side plank on knees
exercises.instructions: Elbow and knee on the floor, hips raised

exercises.name: Reverse crunch
exercises.instructions: Knees at 90°, pull knees toward your chest

exercises.name: Child's pose
exercises.instructions: Hips back toward heels, arms extended in front

exercises.name: Gentle cobra
exercises.instructions: Lying face down, gently lift your upper body

exercises.name: Seated twist
exercises.instructions: Seated with legs crossed, rotate your torso

7.title: Intermediate Full-Body
7.description: Full versions of the fundamental movements

exercises.name: Jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: Moderate pace, arms fully extended

exercises.name: Mobility lunges
exercises.instructions: Deep forward lunge, elbow toward the front foot

exercises.name: Inchworm
exercises.instructions: Standing, walk hands to plank position

exercises.name: Squats
exercises.instructions: 2-second descent, exhale on the way up

exercises.name: Push-ups
exercises.instructions: Body braced, chest to floor, elbows at 45°

exercises.name: Reverse lunges
exercises.instructions: Big step back, back knee near the floor

exercises.name: Full plank
exercises.instructions: Forearms and toes, body in a straight line

exercises.name: Piriforme stretch
exercises.instructions: Cross one ankle over the opposite knee

exercises.name: Shoulder stretch
exercises.instructions: Pull one arm across your chest with the other hand

exercises.name: Standing hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: One foot on a raised surface, leg straight

8.title: EMOM Cardio
8.description: EMOM format to structure your cardio effort

exercises.name: Running in place
exercises.instructions: Light jog in place, build pace

exercises.name: Dynamic knee drives
exercises.instructions: High knees, arms pumping in opposition

exercises.name: Light jump squats
exercises.instructions: Regular squat then a small hop

exercises.name: Burpees without jump
exercises.instructions: Drop to the floor, stand back up

exercises.name: Fast knee drives
exercises.instructions: Drive knees above hip height, quick pace

exercises.name: Jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: Fast pace, arms extended

exercises.name: Dynamic sumo squats
exercises.instructions: Feet wide, lower and rise without pausing

exercises.name: Plank shoulder taps
exercises.instructions: Push-up position, tap the opposite shoulder

exercises.name: Slow walk
exercises.instructions: Wind down gradually

exercises.name: Quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Standing, grab one foot

exercises.name: Diaphragmatic breathing
exercises.instructions: Hands on your belly, inhale 5s, exhale 5s

9.title: Advanced Core
9.description: Full plank holds and stability exercises

exercises.name: Dynamic cat-cow
exercises.instructions: Alternate rounding and arching quickly

exercises.name: Slow dead bug
exercises.instructions: Arms and legs in the air, extend slowly

exercises.name: Standing thoracic rotation

exercises.name: Full plank

exercises.name: Side plank

exercises.name: Dead bug with full extension

exercises.name: Bicycle crunches

exercises.name: Swimmer Superman
exercises.instructions: Lift arms and legs, alternate as if swimming

exercises.name: Child's pose
exercises.instructions: Knees wide, arms extended in front

exercises.name: Cobra
exercises.instructions: On your stomach, push through your hands to lift your chest

exercises.name: Supine twist
exercises.instructions: Arms in a T, knees to one side

exercises.name: Jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: Steady pace, arms fully extended

exercises.name: Inchworm + push-up
exercises.instructions: Walk out to plank, 1 push-up, walk back up

exercises.name: Squat + torso rotation
exercises.instructions: Squat down, rotate your torso

exercises.name: Squats
exercises.instructions: 2-second descent, explosive rise

exercises.name: Push-ups
exercises.instructions: Body braced, controlled descent

exercises.name: Alternating lunges
exercises.instructions: Big step forward, back knee near the floor

exercises.name: Plank shoulder taps
exercises.instructions: Push-up position, tap the opposite shoulder

exercises.name: Walking glute bridge
exercises.instructions: Hips up, take a step forward
